response: Team Alpha’s 23rd sprint, designated Sprint Team Alpha #23, ran for the two-week period spanning January 15 to January 26, with the team planning 42 story points of work at the cycle’s start, ultimately completing 38 total points, checking off 8 full user stories, and resolving 5 tracked bugs throughout the sprint. The team encountered 2 blockers that disrupted progress at points over the course of the cycle, their overall average velocity landed at 36, and internal team satisfaction with the sprint’s outcomes scored a solid 4.1 out of 5.
